prompt: Using the provided reference image as the character and setting base, regenerate it as a new cinematic anime illustration from a closer side-profile angle. Keep the same character identity, glossy black one-piece swimsuit, short dark hair with blue tips, flower earring, seaside sunset lighting, hydrangeas, and the opaque privacy square covering the face. Change the composition so the subject is turned in a left-side three-quarter profile, upper body closer to camera, looking downward/right with wet hair falling forward, creating a more intimate candid moment. Add strong shallow depth of field with exactly 2 prominent blurred hydrangea foreground masses: one large dark purple/blue cluster on the left edge and one soft purple cluster across the lower foreground. Keep the ocean and pink-blue dusk sky in the background, with glowing rim light and reflective highlights on skin and swimsuit. Use a vertical smartphone crop, painterly high-detail anime style, soft bokeh, dreamy summer atmosphere, no added text or watermark.
